title: Middle Eastern Lamb Toast
description: A flavorful and festive Middle Eastern dish featuring lamb, toast, and kombu-cold-extract, perfect for a special occasion, and jain-friendly by using plant-based ingredients instead of traditional lamb.

ingredients.name: lamb substitute
ingredients.notes: such as seitan or textured vegetable protein

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the pita bread into 1-inch thick slices and toast until lightly browned.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the minced garlic.
Add the lamb substitute to the skillet and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Stir in the kombu-cold-extract, lemon juice, sumac, and salt.
Brush the toasted pita bread slices with the lamb mixture and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional sumac and lemon wedges if desired.
